steps.t: There is a poster on the wall by the stairs near Basil Gummidge in Ost Forod. Basil Gummidge has directed your attention to a poster on the wall near …
Basil Gummidge is in Ost Forod. You have found a wanted poster placing a bounty on your head at the behest of one Cuthbert Sprunt.
Basil Gummidge is in Ost Forod. You have defeated Cuthbert Sprunt, despite his underhanded attempts to cheat at the competition, and should now speak …
